villa_name: Luxury converted barn with hilltop views in chianti wine region
exteriors_summary: A beautiful family-friendly villa located in rural Castellina in Chianti, offering stunning views and a heated pool.
location_summary: The villa is situated in a peaceful rural area within the Chianti wine region, providing convenient access to numerous vineyards and historical sites. Located in a rural area within 3 mi (5 km) of Casina di Cornia Winery, Mazzei Winery, and Lilliano Estate Winery. Walls of Monteriggioni is 2.6 mi (4.2 km) away.
the_catch: No specified bedrooms, bathrooms, or guest capacity No specified price range in EUR or USD No specified security deposit Potential lighting issues noted in reviews Beetle bug problems reported by previous guests
title: Luxury converted barn with hilltop views in chianti wine region
